etymology.description: A human (亻) standing on soil (土).
etymology.interpretation: The character 𡈼 combines the element of a human depicted by 亻, indicating a person or presence, and 土 (tǔ, 'earth; soil'), possibly suggesting a person standing on the ground or symbolizing stability or presence in a place. This visual combination conveys the idea of being grounded or located on the earth.
